title: 2) Local points
text:
These are the 15 most used local points on the face. The Stomach channel covers the
largest space on the face. Also, the Large Intestine channel, Gallbladder channel, and Triple
Burner channel also pass through each part of the face. The practitioner can use these points
based on the traditional channel theory, and additionally, as local points for skin tissue
treatment.
~ !  ~
55
DU-24                        LI-20                        GB-1
GB-14                        ST-4                         ST-7
SJ-23                         Ex-HN-4                   ST-3
ST-1                           Ex-HN-3                   ST-6
SI-19                          BL-1                         CV-24
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
